text.title: Google Ads Optimization Cycle Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the methodology applied to a realistic scenario, including the produced artefact.

example.description: Faion month-7 cycle: 95 conv/mo → maximize-conversions. Weekly negative sweep + 3 QS remediations. Monthly rebalance moves $1.2k from bottom-quartile generic campaign to top-quartile brand campaign.
example.note: Bidding aligned with history bucket; weekly + monthly cadence locked; change logged.
